query:
INSERT INTO academy_houses (name, slug, description, ageRange, gradeRange, ceremonialName, colorTheme, status) VALUES
('House of Wonder', 'house-of-wonder', 'Discovery, curiosity, and foundational learning for young flames. Where imagination meets knowledge.', '5-10', 'K-5', 'The Chamber of First Light', 'amber', 'active'),
('House of Form', 'house-of-form', 'Structure, discipline, and intermediate skills. Where young minds learn to shape their purpose.', '11-13', '6-8', 'The Chamber of Sacred Structure', 'emerald', 'active'),
('House of Mastery', 'house-of-mastery', 'Advanced application, sovereignty, and leadership. Where students become keepers of the flame.', '14-18', '9-12', 'The Chamber of Sovereign Fire', 'purple', 'active')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
